Package nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime

Record Class ReportBundles.Bundle

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime.ReportBundles.Bundle
Record Components:
id - the id
metadataDirectory - the metadata directory
bundleRoot - the bundle root
metadataResource - the metadata resource
displayName - the display name
jrxmlResource - the jrxml resource
generatorClassName - the generator class name
beanClassName - the bean class name
beanName - the bean name
description - the description
reportType - the report type
Enclosing class:
ReportBundles
public static record ReportBundles.Bundle(String id, String metadataDirectory, String bundleRoot, String metadataResource, String displayName, String jrxmlResource, String generatorClassName, String beanClassName, String beanName, String description, ReportService.ReportType reportType) extends Record
Immutable metadata describing a single generator/template bundle.

  • Constructor Details

    • Bundle

      public Bundle(String id, String metadataDirectory, String bundleRoot, String metadataResource, String displayName, String jrxmlResource, String generatorClassName, String beanClassName, String beanName, String description, ReportService.ReportType reportType)
      Creates an instance of a Bundle record class.
      Parameters:
      id - the value for the id record component
      metadataDirectory - the value for the metadataDirectory record component
      bundleRoot - the value for the bundleRoot record component
      metadataResource - the value for the metadataResource record component
      displayName - the value for the displayName record component
      jrxmlResource - the value for the jrxmlResource record component
      generatorClassName - the value for the generatorClassName record component
      beanClassName - the value for the beanClassName record component
      beanName - the value for the beanName record component
      description - the value for the description record component
      reportType - the value for the reportType record component

  • Method Details

    • hasBeanClass

      public boolean hasBeanClass()
      Checks for bean class.
      Returns:
      true when a bean class was documented for this bundle.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
